## Verification

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] `cargo build --release`
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] `status` or another smoke check

## Risk Review

- [ ] This change does not weaken approval gating
- [ ] This change preserves inspectable artifacts
- [ ] This change preserves founder voice or documents any intentional shift

## AI-Assisted Code Review

- [ ] I can explain the changed code path and touched invariants plainly
- [ ] I reviewed any AI-generated or copied code line by line before opening this PR
- [ ] I checked the relevant input, file-write, secret, and approval boundaries
- [ ] I called out anything important that I could not verify yet
